reasoning: Your current limiter involves poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, noticeably affecting your power drop-off from 5 to 20 minutes. Considering your last ride was at a moderate effort, this session will prepare you for the sustained climbing demands of the Alpine Loop, particularly targeting your ability to handle fluctuations in power.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 3x15 min over-unders: 3 min at 242W, 2 min at 218W, repeat. Focus on steady HR and breathing.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
